01 / About Me

Who Am I?

#OPENTOWORK

Aspiring Data Analyst
from Coimbatore 🇮🇳

I'm a final-year BSc Computer Science (Cognitive Systems) student passionate about transforming complex datasets into clear, compelling insights. I believe data tells a story — and I'm here to narrate it.

From analyzing 417K+ accident records in Excel to building interactive sales dashboards with Python & SQL, I love turning chaos into clarity. Currently seeking Data Analyst internships and entry-level roles.
